documents.title: Nominee 278
documents.summary: Public financial disclosure filed before Senate confirmation as FAA Administrator. Lists holdings tied to his Republic Airways Holdings role (vested and unvested restricted stock units, severance, STIP/LTIP cash bonuses) plus Cape Air board position and Regional Airline Association leadership. See PDF for itemized assets.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Letter signed June 4, 2025. Commits to: resign from Hyannis Air Services / Cape Air board (Section 2), Regional Airline Association executive committee (Section 3), and 12 Republic Airways entities including Republic Airways Inc, Lynx Aviation, Carmel Finance 2015 LLC, and Lift Aircraft LLC (Section 4); divest restricted stock units; divest Alaska Air Group and Alphabet equity within 90 days (Section 5).

documents.title: Certificate of Divestiture OGE-2025-212
documents.summary: OGE-issued Certificate of Divestiture providing tax-deferral treatment for a specific qualifying divestiture. Document content not publicly downloadable; available via Form 201 request.

documents.title: Compliance Certification
documents.summary: OGE-form certification. Marks Yes/No/N/A on standard sections (resignations, divestitures, periodic transaction reports filed, recusals, ethics briefing).

documents.title: 278 Transaction Report
documents.summary: Periodic transaction report (Form 278-T) disclosing securities transactions over $1,000 during the reporting window. See PDF for itemized transactions including any Republic Airways stock disposals.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: Verified against ProPublica's appointee page for Bryan Bedford. ProPublica's page embeds 5 unique DocumentCloud disclosure documents; Open Cabinet may list additional OGE-indexed ethics, compliance, certificate, waiver, or request-only records that ProPublica does not expose as separate DocumentCloud PDFs. No contradictory filing record was identified in this check.
